name: file_delete_win_zone_identifier_ads_uncommon
raw_query: any where file.path:"*:Zone.Identifier" and (not (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\PowerShell\\7-preview\\pwsh.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\PowerShell\\7\\pwsh.exe", "C:\\Windows\\explorer.exe", "C:\\Windows\\System32\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\explorer.exe", "C:\\Windows\\SysWOW64\\WindowsPowerShell\\v1.0\\powershell.exe"))) and (not ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe")) or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Mozilla Firefox\\firefox.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Mozilla Firefox\\firefox.exe")) or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"))))
